task_completion.description: Open the Sugar desktop settings or 'About Me' section to configure the user profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sugar Control Panel or the 'About Me' settings dialog is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Change the user profile nickname to 'AlexC'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field for the user's name/nickname in the settings dialog explicitly displays 'AlexC'.

task_completion.description: Change the XO icon color scheme to warm orange/yellow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The XO person icon in the settings menu is colored with warm orange and yellow hues (differing from the initial red/blue scheme).

task_completion.description: Launch the Write activity to create the configuration log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sugar Write activity (a word processor interface) is open and active on the screen.

task_completion.description: Document the student name, chosen color, and date in the Write activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main text area in the Write activity contains the name 'Alex Chen', a description of the chosen color (e.g., 'orange', 'yellow'), and a date.

task_completion.description: Save the document with the title 'Student Setup Log'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The activity title bar at the top of the Write interface or the entry in the Sugar Journal explicitly shows the title 'Student Setup Log'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical interface to change profile settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sugar Control Panel/About Me GUI is visible in the screenshots. The agent should not use a terminal window running `gsettings` commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Write activity for the log.
integrity.visual_evidence: The genuine Sugar Write activity UI is visible. The agent should not use a terminal-based text editor (like nano or vim) or echo commands to create the file.

integrity.description: Verify the document was titled and saved via standard Sugar OS interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The title 'Student Setup Log' is typed into the Write activity's title field. There should be no terminal windows manipulating the Sugar Journal datastore directly via scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected nickname to be set is exactly 'AlexC'. The initial nickname was 'Learner' and the initial color was '#FF2B34,#005FE4' (red/blue). The expected title for the Journal entry is exactly 'Student Setup Log'.
